requests.prompt: Realistic vertical 9:16 commercial still frame, not a video storyboard. Purpose: customer pain: Wearing lipstick leaves embarrassing lip marks on cups and smudges with everyday use, forcing constant cleanups and touch-ups.. Product: Lipstick. If visible, the product must match the product reference image in color, shape, packaging, and logo/mark. Consistent assets: Adult woman in her late 20s with medium skin tone, warm undertone; Simple light beige knit top, minimal jewelry; Shoulder-length hair in a low, neat bun; Bright home kitchen breakfast nook; Soft natural daylight from a window, even and flattering. Start frame: Vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up at a light wood kitchen table. The woman (late 20s, medium skin, low bun, beige top) holds a plain white ceramic mug with one small red lipstick mark already on the rim facing the camera. Her other hand lightly supports the mug. Soft natural window light. Background is a clean white-tile backsplash and a small plant. Camera on tripod, steady. No product tube visible yet. The lipstick on her lips looks slightly worn, realistic. Composition: one clear subject, one scene, stable camera, proof detail large and sharp on mobile. No overlay text in the image; overlay text will be added later in post-production.
requests.negative_prompt: No subtitles, captions, UI, watermark, random letters, background text, fake logos, price tags, posters, split screen, collage, extra fingers, warped hands, distorted face, blurry product, blurry proof detail, harsh glare, mirror reflections, glass distortion. Handheld shake, montage, split screen, exaggerated or smeared lipstick all over, multiple or giant stains, dirty or cracked mug, clear glass cup, strong reflections, mirrored.
